description: Standard phrase options for Streamlit picker and Excel PhraseCatalog sheet (phrase_key, option_id, text).

options.label: Option 1 (AER, 2014)
options.text: Drilling waste was managed in accordance with AER requirements. Option 1 (AER, 2014) applies to this well.

options.label: Option 2 — alternative disposal
options.text: Drilling waste was managed under an approved alternative disposal pathway. Details are summarized in the drilling waste table.

options.label: Site visit not completed
options.text: A site visit was not completed as part of this Phase I ESA. Findings are based on available records, regulatory databases, and historical air photo review.

options.label: Site visit completed
options.text: A site visit was completed as part of this Phase I ESA. Observations from the visit are summarized below and in the site visit checklist.

options.label: Phase II recommended
options.text: Based on the findings of this Phase I ESA, a Phase II Environmental Site Assessment is recommended to further evaluate identified areas of potential environmental concern.

options.label: Phase II not required at this time
options.text: Based on the findings of this Phase I ESA, a Phase II Environmental Site Assessment is not recommended at this time, subject to client direction and future land use.
